session.authoritative_completion: terminal schema-constrained structuredOutput after actual repository inspection, focused verification, production mutation, exact restoration, and identity checks
session.envelope_note: The first response claimed tool and mutation work that its exported transcript did not contain, so it was discarded. The same session resumed under actual-execution requirements. The later CLI envelope included multiple interim schema-shaped messages and non-authoritative internal chatter; only the terminal structuredOutput is recorded as the verdict.

structured_output.summary: The exact reviewed range adds an additive four-arm sustained supplement bound to the retained valid 96-arm session and inventory digest, without rerunning the fixed matrix or changing its performance grading. Staging and capacity checks remain fail-closed, every sustained arm must accept ADD above the four-stream floor, and each initiator-layout pair must match material accepted membership transitions.
structured_output.guard_proof: The reviewer changed the production accepted-ADD-above-floor requirement so the NO_ACCEPTED_ADD_ABOVE_FLOOR condition could not be recorded. The focused sustained analyzer test turned red because arm_review_count fell from 1 to 0. Exact restoration returned Bash syntax, the four-arm no-SSH self-test, and all 81 analyzer tests green; the detached worktree ended clean at the reviewed SHA.

checks.scope_audit: separate four-arm sustained supplement bound to the exact parent evidence, with no fixed-matrix rerun or performance regrading
checks.capacity_audit: stable sustained sources and retained destinations are pre-reserved additively above the endpoint free-space floor
checks.guard_mutation: production NO_ACCEPTED_ADD_ABOVE_FLOOR recording disabled; focused sustained analyzer test failed because the required arm review disappeared; exact restoration returned green
checks.independent_postcheck: primary agent re-proved exact HEAD, clean status, Bash syntax, four-arm self-test, 81 analyzer tests, and SHA-256 identity for all three executable files

policy_note: This is tactical advisory code review, not a formal openreview acceptance verdict.
